title: nepeta bazoftica
intro: Nepeta bazoftica is a plant species belonging to the Nepeta genus, commonly referred to as catmint. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to alleviate digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Nepeta bazoftica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
